name: Okura Holdings Limited
summary: Okura Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates pachinko and pachislot halls in Japan. As of June 30, 2020, the company operated 17 pachinko halls under the Big Apple, K's Plaza, Big Apple, YOUPARK, and Monaco names in the Kyushu, Kanto, Kansai, and Chugoku regions. It also invests in and rents real estate properties; and provides business consulting services. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Nagasaki, Japan.
